authors: Siebert, C., Smallfield, S. & Stark, S.
title: Occupational Therapy Practice Guidelines for Home Modifications
note: Confirmed. AOTA Press is the American Occupational Therapy Association's publishing arm. This is the primary US OT CPG for home modifications.

authors: Royal College of Occupational Therapists (RCOT) / Housing LIN
title: Housing Adaptations Without Delay: A good practice guide to delivering timely home adaptations
note: Confirmed. Published June 2019. Commissioned by RCOT, written by Housing LIN. Primary UK OT CPG for adaptations delivery.
Duplicate of Co2-02. Same RCOT HAwD 2019 document.
Duplicate of Co2-02. Same RCOT HAwD 2019 document (slug variant).

Not found. No distinct 2020 RCOT/Housing LIN dementia design publication identified. RCOT dementia guideline was in development as of late 2024. BPC entry may be: (a) incorrect date, (b) a Housing LIN viewpoint not an RCOT CPG, or (c) an internal resource. Forward to BPC author for exact title and URL.

title: Myalgic encephalomyelitis (or encephalopathy)/chronic fatigue syndrome: diagnosis and management (NG206)
publisher: National Institute for Health and Care Excellence
note: Confirmed. Published 29 Oct 2021. Primary UK clinical guidance for ME/CFS. Relevant to built environment provisions for energy conservation.

title: Position statement on occupational therapy and accessibility to built environments
publisher: COTEC (Council of Occupational Therapists for the European Countries) / WFOT
note: Confirmed. COTEC is the European OT professional body; WFOT is the World Federation. Real position statement.

title: Living Well by Design
note: Confirmed. RCOT 2023 publication on design for independence. URL confirmed.

title: Home Modification Guidelines for Occupational Therapists
note: Confirmed. HMC is the leading Australian OT home modification research and practice centre at UNSW Sydney. URL confirmed.

title: OT Practice Document: Home Assessment and Modifications

title: Inclusive Housing Design Guide
